## Week in Review: 2026-03-23 to 2026-03-29

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 14.7.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.6 (-47.1% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.05)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.0 (-41.7% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.14)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.7 (-42.9% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 14.7 (-57.4% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.10)
